'''chashara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zebec|zebec]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zebec|zebec]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chashara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæshæræth|chæshæræth]] || [[word:chæshæræj|chæshæræj]] || [[word:chæshæræsh|chæshæræsh]] || [[word:chæshæræ|chæshæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chashasharath|chashasharath]] || [[word:chashasharaj|chashasharaj]] || [[word:chashasharash|chashasharash]] || [[word:chashashara|chashashara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chasharath|chasharath]] || [[word:chasharaj|chasharaj]] || [[word:chasharash|chasharash]] || [[word:chashara|chashara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chashafrath|chashafrath]] || [[word:chashafraj|chashafraj]] || [[word:chashafrash|chashafrash]] || [[word:chashafraf|chashafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chasharatha|chasharatha]] || [[word:chasharaja|chasharaja]] || [[word:chasharasha|chasharasha]] || [[word:chasharaka|chasharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chasharath|chasharath]] || [[word:chasharaj|chasharaj]] || [[word:chasharash|chasharash]] || [[word:chashara|chashara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chasharathal|chasharathal]] || [[word:chasharajal|chasharajal]] || [[word:chasharashal|chasharashal]] || [[word:chasharakal|chasharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chasharathatha|chasharathatha]] || [[word:chasharajaja|chasharajaja]] || [[word:chasharashasha|chasharashasha]] || [[word:chasharaka|chasharaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chasharathan|chasharathan]] || [[word:chasharajan|chasharajan]] || [[word:chasharashan|chasharashan]] || [[word:chasharakan|chasharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chasharathaoro|chasharathaoro]] || [[word:chasharajaoro|chasharajaoro]] || [[word:chasharashaoro|chasharashaoro]] || [[word:chasharakaoro|chasharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
